characters.name: [Name_01]
characters.background: Long-time Newport resident who knew the player's family. Runs a small business and has connections throughout the community.
characters.personality: Wise, patient, protective. Speaks with a gentle Arkansas drawl and often references local history.
characters.appearance: Salt-and-pepper hair, weathered hands, kind eyes. Usually wears work clothes and a baseball cap from a local business.
characters.dialogue_style: Folksy, encouraging, full of local wisdom
characters.backstory: Grew up in Newport, worked various jobs including time on the river. Knew player's family well and feels responsible for their success.
characters.goals: Help the player establish themselves in Newport while keeping them grounded in community values.
characters.secrets: Knows more about the player's family history than he initially reveals.

characters.name: [Name_02]
characters.background: Ambitious newcomer who arrived in Newport five years ago and quickly made a name for themselves in business.
characters.personality: Competitive, charming when needed, always looking for an angle. Confident but insecure about their outsider status.
characters.appearance: Well-dressed, modern style that stands out in Newport. Always looking sharp and put-together.
characters.dialogue_style: Smooth, slightly condescending, uses business jargon
characters.backstory: Came to Newport with big city ambitions, has been successful but struggles with acceptance from old-timers.
characters.goals: Dominate Newport's business scene and prove outsiders can succeed here.
characters.secrets: Deeply wants acceptance from the community but won't admit it.

characters.name: [Name_03]
characters.background: Third-generation barber whose family has cut hair in Newport since the 1950s.
characters.personality: Traditional, meticulous, proud of his craft. Values skill and respect for tradition above all else.
characters.appearance: Classic barber look - white coat, precise mustache, steady hands. Traditional tools and old-school style.
characters.dialogue_style: Measured, traditional, speaks with authority about the trade
characters.backstory: Learned the trade from his father and grandfather, has seen Newport change over decades.
characters.goals: Maintain the tradition and standards of barbering while passing on knowledge to the next generation.
characters.secrets: Worries about the future of traditional barbering in modern Newport.

characters.name: [Name_04]
characters.background: Former Little Rock resident who moved to Newport to open a wellness business, bringing modern spa culture to town.
characters.personality: Calm, spiritual, business-savvy. Believes in the healing power of relaxation and self-care.
characters.appearance: Flowing clothes, natural makeup, peaceful demeanor. Embodies the wellness lifestyle she promotes.
characters.dialogue_style: Soothing, philosophical, occasionally uses wellness terminology
characters.backstory: Left corporate life in Little Rock to pursue wellness entrepreneurship in a more peaceful setting.
characters.goals: Build a successful wellness business while helping Newport residents embrace self-care.
characters.secrets: Sometimes misses the excitement of city life but won't admit it.

characters.name: [Name_05]
characters.background: Young entrepreneur with multiple small businesses and side gigs around Newport.
characters.personality: Energetic, opportunistic, friendly but always has an angle. Quick to spot trends and opportunities.
characters.appearance: Casual but trendy, always carrying multiple phones or devices. Style changes based on current hustle.
characters.dialogue_style: Fast-talking, enthusiastic, full of ideas and schemes
characters.backstory: Newport native who never left but constantly looks for ways to make money and stay relevant.
characters.goals: Build a business empire through various hustles and schemes.
characters.secrets: Sometimes stretches the truth about how successful their ventures really are.

characters.name: [Name_06]
characters.background: Newport Police Department officer who knows everyone in town and takes community policing seriously.
characters.personality: Fair, observant, protective of the community. Firm but understanding with locals.
characters.appearance: Professional police uniform, confident posture, alert eyes that notice everything.
characters.dialogue_style: Professional but warm, speaks with authority but shows genuine care for community
characters.backstory: Grew up in nearby town, chose Newport for her career because she believes in community policing.
characters.goals: Keep Newport safe while building trust between police and community.
characters.secrets: Knows about more community secrets than she lets on but keeps confidences.

characters.name: [Name_07]
characters.background: Long-time Newport resident who was initially skeptical of the spa but became a regular client.
characters.personality: Initially cautious, becomes enthusiastic when convinced. Values practical benefits over trends.
characters.appearance: Conservative style becoming more relaxed, evidence of spa treatments like improved skin and relaxed demeanor.
characters.dialogue_style: Practical, honest, becomes enthusiastic about things she believes in
characters.backstory: Skeptical of new trends but open to things that provide real value. Represents local opinion.
characters.goals: Enjoy the benefits of wellness while staying true to traditional values.
characters.secrets: Enjoys the luxury more than she admits to her traditional friends.

characters.name: [Name_08]
characters.background: Mysterious Newport character who seems to know everyone and everything but keeps their own counsel.
characters.personality: Enigmatic, observant, appears randomly with useful information or unexpected help.
characters.appearance: Nondescript clothes that help them blend in anywhere, forgettable until they speak.
characters.dialogue_style: Cryptic but helpful, speaks in hints and suggestions
characters.backstory: Long history in Newport but details are vague. Seems to have connections everywhere.
characters.goals: Unknown, but actions suggest they want to see Newport and its people succeed.
characters.secrets: Everything about them is a secret, but they know everyone else's secrets too.

name_usage_guidelines.placeholder_policy: All placeholder names should be used until real names are provided with consent
name_usage_guidelines.consent_process: Contact each person individually, explain the character and game, get written permission
name_usage_guidelines.backup_plan: If consent is not given, continue using placeholder names or create alternative characters
name_usage_guidelines.character_modification: Characters may be modified to protect privacy while maintaining story integrity

character_relationships.mentor_rival: Tension - mentor represents old Newport, rival represents new ambitions
character_relationships.barbershop_spa: Professional respect despite different approaches to personal care
character_relationships.police_everyone: Officer Santos knows all characters and their business
character_relationships.wildcard_mystery: River Johnson has mysterious connections to all other characters
